name: Cheryl's Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions: Makes two 9-inch round pans or one 9 x 13-inch pan. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 C). Grease and flour the pan(s). In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon with an electric mixer until well blended. Add shredded carrots, cooking oil, and eggs. Mix on low speed until just combined. Beat for 2 minutes on medium speed. Pour into prepared pan(s) and bake in the preheated oven for 9-inch rounds approximately 40 minutes or 9 x 13-inch pan 50-60 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes before removing cake from the pan(s). For frosting, beat together cream cheese, butter, and vanilla until smooth. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until the desired consistency is reached.
